rows.Product: Broccoli microgreens — 50 g (no UPC; sold from 2026-04-20 to 2026-05-08)
rows.Reason: Microbial contamination — pathogenic E. coli
rows.Notes: CFIA Food recall warning, RA-82109 / NID 17385. Distribution: Online + Ontario + Quebec. No reported illnesses. Recall triggered by the company. Third recall in the ongoing CFIA E. coli microgreens investigation chain (see also: Germina brand Brocoli Calabrese seeds, Recalls rows ~124+127, dated 2026-05-06; and Micro Verdure brand microgreens, Recalls row 4, dated 2026-05-20). CFIA continues food safety investigation. [manual-add 2026-05-22 16:00 Athens]
